name: Eval Suite
description: Model evaluation test suite for running, reviewing, and comparing evaluation results with per-test breakdowns and regression detection.

page_briefs.evals: Data table of eval suites with columns for suite name, model target, test count, pass rate progress bar, last run timestamp, and status badge (passed/failed/running). Filter chips for status and model. 'New Suite' button in top-right.
page_briefs.eval-detail: Dashboard with summary stats row at top (total tests, pass rate, avg latency, regression count). Below, a scrollable per-test breakdown table with expandable rows showing input, expected output, actual output, and score. Failed tests highlighted in red.
page_briefs.eval-compare: Side-by-side model comparison dashboard. Header shows model names with overall scores. Grouped bar charts compare per-category accuracy. Below, a delta table highlights tests where models diverge, sorted by score difference.
page_briefs.eval-create: Two-section form. Top section has form fields for suite name, description, model selector, and evaluation criteria toggles. Bottom section is a compact data table for adding test cases with columns for input, expected output, weight, and tags. Add-row button at table footer.

shells.sidebar-main: Collapsible sidebar with eval suite tree and main content area
